keywordspec.name: lge.auto.Ignition
keywordspec.doc:
Library for Ignition.
*Useage*: 1. Call `Connect Ignition` - ``host`` default value is 192.18.1.4 - ``port`` default value is 15500 - connect ignintion
2. Call `Send Command` - ``cmd`` hex format string - send cmd to HU
3. Call `Compare packet` - ``expected`` hex format string
4. Call `Disconnect Ignition` - disconnect ICAS3 ignition

kw.name: Compare packet
kw.doc:
Compare ``expected`` and self.last_recv
- :param expected: hex string ex: 00 65 - :return: If found expected in self.last_recv then return True. else return False (boolean)
Examples: | `Compare packet` | 00_65 | | ${result}= | `Compare packet` | 00_65 | | ${result}= | `Compare packet` | 00 65 |

kw.name: Connect Ignition
kw.doc:
connect Ignition
precondtion is that does not input "enter key" on uart because if input "enter key" to uart, does not run testiface in ICAS3 or MIB3
- :param host: default value is 192.168.1.4 - :param port: default value is 15500 - :return: return socket.connect_ex result
Examples: | `Connect Ignition` | | `Connect Ignition` | 192.168.1.4 | 15500 |

kw.name: Send Command
kw.doc:
Send packet to HU.
parket format is Header + ``cmd`` + checksum In this method make packet and send packet to HU And save last recive packet to self.last_recv in Ignition Class
- :param cmd: hex format string ex) 02 2c 01 09 - :return: recvie packet ex) 93 87 ab cd 00 00 00 00 82 2c 02 00 65 bb
Examples: | `Send Command` | 02 2c 01 09 | | ${result}= | `Send Command` | 02 2c 01 09 |
